and such business is re-established or revived within 3 years from the end of such
previous year.
It is not formed by the transfer to a new business of machinery or plant previously used
for any purpose.
Exceptions: However, any machinery or plant which was used outside India by any
person other than the assessee shall not be regarded as machinery or plant previously
used for any purpose, if all the following conditions are fulfilled, namely:—
